allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Capstone Project"; npm create vite@latest web -- --template react-ts 2>&1 | tail -5)
PowerShell(cd "c:\\Capstone Project"; npm create vite@latest web -- --template react-ts; Write-Host "Scaffold done")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} teams, first:', d[0]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Game pred:', d.get\('home_name'\), d.get\('win_prob_home'\), 'vs', d.get\('away_name'\), d.get\('win_prob_away'\), '| score:', d.get\('home_score'\), '-', d.get\('away_score'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); inj=d.get\('injuries',[]\); print\(f'Injuries: {len\(inj\)}, first:', inj[0] if inj else 'none'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{p['name']}: {p['predictions']['pts']} pts {p['predictions']['min']} min\\"\) for p in d['players']]")
